insert-page-range.title: Insert Page Range from One PDF into Another
insert-page-range.description: Demonstrates inserting a range of pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF using file paths with PdfFileEditor.

insert-page-range-stream.title: Insert Page Range into PDF Using Streams
insert-page-range-stream.description: Demonstrates inserting a range of pages from one PDF into another PDF using stream parameters with PdfFileEditor.

insert-specific-pages.title: Insert Specific Pages from One PDF into Another
insert-specific-pages.description: Demonstrates inserting selected pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF at a given position using file paths.

insert-pages-into-pdf-streams.title: Insert Specific Pages into PDF Using Streams
insert-pages-into-pdf-streams.description: Demonstrates how to insert selected pages from one PDF stream into another PDF at a specified position using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

insert-pages-at-beginning.title: Insert Pages at Beginning of PDF using PdfFileEditor
insert-pages-at-beginning.description: Demonstrates how to insert pages from a source PDF at the start of a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

insert-pages-mid-position.title: Insert Pages from Source PDF into Destination PDF at Middle Position
insert-pages-mid-position.description: Demonstrates inserting pages from a source PDF into the middle of a destination PDF using PdfFileEditor.

append-pages-pdf.title: Append Pages from Source PDF to Destination PDF
append-pages-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to append pages from a source PDF file to the end of a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

insert-pdf-pages-memory.title: Insert PDF Pages from Memory Streams
insert-pdf-pages-memory.description: Demonstrates inserting pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF loaded entirely in memory and obtaining the merged result in a MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-insert-page-ranges.title: Batch Insert Page Ranges from Multiple PDFs
batch-insert-page-ranges.description: Shows how to insert specific page ranges from several source PDFs into a destination PDF in a loop using PdfFileEditor.

insert-multiple-pdf-pages.title: Insert Pages from Multiple PDFs Using PdfFileEditor
insert-multiple-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates inserting selected pages from several source PDFs into a target PDF in a single operation using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

load-pdf-with-pdffileeditor.title: Load PDF using PdfFileEditor
load-pdf-with-pdffileeditor.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file from a file path using the PdfFileEditor facade.

load-pdf-with-pdffileeditor__v2.title: Load PDF using PdfFileEditor
load-pdf-with-pdffileeditor__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file from a path using the PdfFileEditor class.

insert-image-stamp-save.title: Insert Image Stamp into PDF and Save
insert-image-stamp-save.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to a PDF using PdfFileStamp and save the modified document to a file.

save-pdf-to-memorystream.title: Save Modified PDF to MemoryStream
save-pdf-to-memorystream.description: Loads a PDF, adds a text annotation, and saves the result into a MemoryStream without writing to disk.

split-pdf-from-first-to-end.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified End Page
split-pdf-from-first-to-end.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF from the first page up to a given page using file paths and save the resulting document.

split-pdf-from-first-page.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified Page Using Streams
split-pdf-from-first-page.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF from the first page up to a given page using in-memory streams with Aspose.Pdf.

split-pdf-into-bulks.title: Split PDF into Multiple Bulk Page Sets
split-pdf-into-bulks.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into several documents based on start‑end page ranges using PdfFileEditor.SplitToBulks.

split-pdf-into-bulks__v2.title: Split PDF into Bulk Page Sets Using Streams
split-pdf-into-bulks__v2.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into multiple bulk page sets using a stream input and obtain the resulting documents as an array of MemoryStream objects.

split-pdf-from-start-to-end.title: Split PDF from a Start Page to End
split-pdf-from-start-to-end.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF starting at a specified page to the end of the document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

split-pdf-from-start-to-end__v2.title: Split PDF from a Start Page to End Using Streams
split-pdf-from-start-to-end__v2.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF starting at a specified page to the end using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor with streams, returning the result as a MemoryStream.

split-pdf-into-pages.title: Split PDF into Individual Page PDFs
split-pdf-into-pages.description: Shows how to split a PDF into separate one-page PDF files using PdfFileEditor with a filename template.

split-pdf-into-pages__v2.title: Split PDF into Individual Page PDFs Using Streams
split-pdf-into-pages__v2.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDFs by loading the source file as a stream, using PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages, and writing each resulting MemoryStream to a file.

split-pdf-bulk-streams.title: Split PDF into Multiple Files Using Bulk Split and Save Streams
split-pdf-bulk-streams.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into separate documents using PdfFileEditor.SplitToBulks and write each resulting MemoryStream to an individual PDF file.

concatenate-split-pdfs-insertpages.title: Concatenate Split PDFs Using InsertPages
concatenate-split-pdfs-insertpages.description: Demonstrates how to merge multiple split PDF files into a single PDF by inserting pages from each source document.

split-from-first.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified Page
split-from-first.description: Shows how to extract the first N pages of a PDF file using PdfFileEditor.SplitFromFirst with simple file paths.

split-from-first-stream.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified Page Using Streams
split-from-first-stream.description: Demonstrates how to extract pages from the beginning of a PDF up to a given page using PdfFileEditor.SplitFromFirst with in-memory streams.

split-pdf-into-bulks__v3.title: Split PDF into Multiple Page Ranges Using SplitToBulks
split-pdf-into-bulks__v3.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into several documents based on custom page ranges using PdfFileEditor.SplitToBulks.

split-pdf-into-bulks__v4.title: Split PDF into Bulk Ranges Using Streams
split-pdf-into-bulks__v4.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into multiple bulk ranges using PdfFileEditor.SplitToBulks with input and output streams.

split-pdf-to-end.title: Split PDF from a Start Page to End Using PdfFileEditor
split-pdf-to-end.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF from a specified start page to the end using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToEnd.

split-to-end-stream.title: Split PDF from a Start Page to End Using In-Memory Streams
split-to-end-stream.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF from a specified start page to the end using PdfFileEditor with input and output streams, keeping the operation entirely in memory.

split-pdf-individual-pages.title: Split PDF into Individual Pages Using PdfFileEditor
split-pdf-individual-pages.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDF files using the PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages method with a filename template.

split-pdf-into-pages-streams.title: Split PDF into Individual Pages Using Streams
split-pdf-into-pages-streams.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDFs using PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages with streams, returning an array of MemoryStream objects.

delete-pages-2-5.title: Delete Pages 2 Through 5 from PDF
delete-pages-2-5.description: Demonstrates how to remove pages 2 to 5 from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with the file‑path overload.

delete-pages-stream.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF Using Streams
delete-pages-stream.description: Demonstrates how to delete selected pages from a PDF by providing input and output streams to PdfFileEditor.

remove-first-last-pages.title: Remove First and Last Pages from PDF
remove-first-last-pages.description: Demonstrates how to delete the first and last pages of a PDF using PdfFileEditor with an integer array.

batch-delete-pages.title: Batch Delete Pages from Multiple PDFs
batch-delete-pages.description: Deletes specified pages from every PDF file in a directory using PdfFileEditor in a loop.

concatenate-three-pdfs.title: Concatenate Three PDFs Using PdfFileEditor
concatenate-three-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to merge three PDF files into one by chaining the three‑argument Concatenate method of PdfFileEditor.

merge-pdf-streams.title: Merge PDF Streams into a Single PDF
merge-pdf-streams.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate multiple PDF input streams into one output stream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

combine-two-pdfs.title: Combine Two PDFs into One
combine-two-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate two PDF files into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

concatenate-pdfs-memory-streams.title: Concatenate PDFs from Memory Streams
concatenate-pdfs-memory-streams.description: Demonstrates concatenating two PDF files loaded into memory streams and writing the merged result directly to a file without intermediate storage.

batch-concatenate-pdfs.title: Batch Concatenate PDFs in a Folder
batch-concatenate-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate all PDF files in a specified folder into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and a foreach loop.

measure-concatenation-time-streams.title: Measure Concatenation Time for Fifty PDFs Using Streams
measure-concatenation-time-streams.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate fifty PDF files using the stream overload of PdfFileEditor while measuring execution time.

compare-concatenation-memory.title: Compare Memory Usage of PdfFileEditor Concatenation Overloads
compare-concatenation-memory.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate PDFs using file‑path and stream overloads of PdfFileEditor and measures memory consumption for each approach.

create-booklet-pdf.title: Create Booklet PDF using PdfFileEditor
create-booklet-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor with default settings.

create-booklet-a5.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom A5 Page Size
create-booklet-a5.description: Creates a booklet from an existing PDF using the A5 page size via the PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet overload.

custom-booklet-left-right-pages.title: Create Custom Booklet with Specified Left and Right Pages
custom-booklet-left-right-pages.description: Demonstrates how to create a booklet PDF by specifying custom left‑hand odd pages and right‑hand even pages using PdfFileEditor.

create-booklet-streams.title: Create Booklet from PDF Using Streams with Custom Page Size
create-booklet-streams.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF from an existing PDF using input and output streams while specifying a custom page size.

create-booklet-pdfs.title: Create Booklet PDFs for Multiple Files
create-booklet-pdfs.description: Generates a booklet version of each PDF in a collection, saving each result in its own output directory.

delete-pages-make-booklet.title: Delete Pages and Create Booklet from PDF
delete-pages-make-booklet.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF and then generate a booklet using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pages-concatenate.title: Delete Pages and Concatenate PDFs using Aspose.Pdf
delete-pages-concatenate.description: Demonstrates removing specific pages from a PDF and then merging the edited document with another PDF using the PdfFileEditor facade.

delete-pdf-pages.title: Delete Pages from PDF with Error Handling
delete-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to delete specific pages from a PDF using PdfFileEditor while handling missing input files.

batch-booklet-creation.title: Batch Booklet Creation with Audit Logging
batch-booklet-creation.description: Creates booklets from multiple PDF files using PdfFileEditor and logs each step to a text file for audit.

resize-pdf-letter-size.title: Resize PDF to Letter Size
resize-pdf-letter-size.description: Loads a PDF, resizes all pages to US Letter dimensions, and saves the result.

resize-pdf-pages-8-5x11.title: Resize PDF Pages to 8.5x11 Inches via Stream
resize-pdf-pages-8-5x11.description: Demonstrates how to resize all pages of a PDF to standard US Letter dimensions (8.5×11 inches) using PdfFileEditor with the stream overload.

batch-resize-pdfs-a4.title: Batch Resize PDFs to A4 Size
batch-resize-pdfs-a4.description: Resizes all PDF files in a folder to A4 page size and saves them to a target directory.

measure-printlargepdf-performance.title: Measure PrintLargePdf Performance Using File Path vs Stream
measure-printlargepdf-performance.description: Demonstrates how to time the PdfViewer.PrintLargePdf method when loading a large PDF via a file path versus a stream.

create-2up-pdf.title: Create 2-up PDF Layout Using MakeNup
create-2up-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to combine two PDF files into a side-by-side 2-up layout using PdfFileEditor.MakeNup.

create-4up-pdf-memory.title: Create 4‑up PDF using stream overload and memory output
create-4up-pdf-memory.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 4‑up grid to a PDF using PdfFileEditor.MakeNUp with stream inputs and write the result to a MemoryStream.

batch-nup-pdf.title: Batch Create 3‑by‑2 N‑up PDFs
batch-nup-pdf.description: Processes a list of PDF files and creates N‑up versions with three columns and two rows per page.

nup-booklet.title: Create N‑up Layout and Generate Booklet PDF
nup-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to combine N‑up page arrangement with booklet generation using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-pages-resize-pdf.title: Delete Pages and Resize PDF from Stream
delete-pages-resize-pdf.description: Demonstrates deleting specific pages from a PDF stream and then resizing the remaining pages before saving the result.

remove-pages-parallel.title: Remove Specified Pages from Multiple PDFs in Parallel
remove-pages-parallel.description: Demonstrates how to delete a set of pages from several PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

concatenate-pdfs-stream.title: Concatenate PDFs Using Stream Overloads
concatenate-pdfs-stream.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate multiple PDF files supplied via command‑line arguments using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor with stream overloads.

page-delete-out-of-range-test.title: Unit Test for Page Delete Out-of-Range Exception
page-delete-out-of-range-test.description: Demonstrates a unit test that verifies Delete throws an exception when the page index exceeds the document length.

create-booklet-pdf__v2.title: Create Booklet PDF from Stream
create-booklet-pdf__v2.description: Creates a booklet PDF from an input PDF stream and returns it as a MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-booklet.title: Create PDF Booklet with Custom Page Order
create-pdf-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF by specifying custom left and right page sequences using PdfFileEditor.

create-booklet-custom-page-size.title: Create Booklet with Custom Page Size from PDF Stream
create-booklet-custom-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF with a custom 5.5×8.5‑inch page size from an input PDF stream using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-concatenation.title: Validate PDF Concatenation Preserves Page Order
validate-pdf-concatenation.description: Demonstrates concatenating two PDFs and verifying that the resulting document retains the original page order by checking page counts and dimensions.

delete-pages-from-pdfs.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDFs in a Folder
delete-pages-from-pdfs.description: Deletes pages 3 and 4 from each PDF file in a source directory and saves the resulting PDFs to an output directory using PdfFileEditor.

concatenate-pdfs-with-logging.title: Concatenate Multiple PDFs with Logging
concatenate-pdfs-with-logging.description: Demonstrates merging several PDF files into one while logging each concatenation step.

create-booklet-odd-left-pages.title: Create Booklet from PDF Stream with Odd Left Pages
create-booklet-odd-left-pages.description: Shows how to use PdfFileEditor to generate a booklet from a PDF stream, specifying only odd-numbered pages as the left side of the booklet.

resize-pdf-stream.title: Resize PDF Pages to Custom Dimensions Using Streams
resize-pdf-stream.description: Demonstrates resizing all pages of a PDF to 1024x768 using PdfFileEditor stream overload and verifies the new page size.

delete-pages-concatenate-pdfs.title: Delete Pages and Concatenate PDFs
delete-pages-concatenate-pdfs.description: Deletes specified pages from multiple PDFs and then concatenates the cleaned files into a single PDF.

concatenate-pdfs.title: Concatenate Multiple PDFs into One File
concatenate-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to merge several PDF files into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

merge-pdfs-from-streams.title: Merge PDFs from Network Streams and Save Locally
merge-pdfs-from-streams.description: Demonstrates merging two PDF files obtained from network streams directly into a local PDF file without creating intermediate files.

makebooklet-null-page-arrays.title: Test MakeBooklet Throws Exception for Null Page Arrays
makebooklet-null-page-arrays.description: Demonstrates that PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet throws an exception when leftPages and rightPages arrays are null.

delete-pages-get-size.title: Delete Specified Pages from PDF and Get File Size
delete-pages-get-size.description: Deletes given pages from a PDF using PdfFileEditor and returns the size of the resulting file.

concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-pages.title: Concatenate PDFs with Blank Pages Between
concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-pages.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF files inserting a blank page between each document using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-a5-booklet.title: Resize PDFs to A5 and Create Booklets
resize-pdf-a5-booklet.description: Resizes each PDF to A5 page size and then generates a booklet version using PdfFileEditor.

delete-pages-2up-pdf.title: Delete Pages and Apply 2‑up Layout to PDF Stream
delete-pages-2up-pdf.description: Demonstrates deleting selected pages from a PDF stream and then creating a 2‑up layout, saving the result to another stream using Aspose.Pdf.

create-booklet-pdf__v3.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom Page Order
create-booklet-pdf__v3.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF by specifying custom left and right page sequences using PdfFileEditor.

concatenate-pdfs-preserve-metadata.title: Concatenate PDFs while preserving metadata
concatenate-pdfs-preserve-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate multiple PDF files using PdfFileEditor and retain the original author and title metadata from the first document.

create-booklet-from-stream.title: Create Booklet from PDF Stream after Deleting Pages and Resizing
create-booklet-from-stream.description: Demonstrates how to delete a page range, resize pages, and generate a booklet PDF using streams with Aspose.Pdf.

create-booklet-custom-page-sizes.title: Create Booklet PDFs with Custom Page Sizes
create-booklet-custom-page-sizes.description: Demonstrates how to generate booklet PDFs from multiple source files using PdfFileEditor with various page size settings.

concatenate-pdfs-from-zip.title: Concatenate PDFs from a ZIP Archive and Store Result Back into the Archive
concatenate-pdfs-from-zip.description: Demonstrates reading PDF files from a ZIP archive, concatenating them using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor, and writing the merged PDF back into the same archive.

delete-pdf-pages__v2.title: Delete Pages from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
delete-pdf-pages__v2.description: Command‑line tool that removes specified pages from a PDF file and saves the result to a new file.

parallel-delete-pages.title: Parallel Deletion of Pages from Multiple PDFs
parallel-delete-pages.description: Demonstrates how to delete specified pages from several PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

resize-to-landscape-booklet.title: Resize PDF to Landscape and Create Booklet
resize-to-landscape-booklet.description: Rotates all pages of a PDF to landscape orientation and then generates a booklet using PdfFileEditor.

pdffileeditor-concatenate-empty-stream.title: PdfFileEditor Concatenate Throws on Empty Stream Array
pdffileeditor-concatenate-empty-stream.description: Unit test that verifies PdfFileEditor.Concatenate throws an exception when called with an empty array of input streams.

concatenate-pdf-streams.title: Concatenate Multiple PDF Streams via HTTP
concatenate-pdf-streams.description: Demonstrates an ASP.NET Core endpoint that receives PDF files as streams, concatenates them using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor, and returns the merged PDF.

log-page-deletions.title: Log Number of Pages Removed During Delete Operations
log-page-deletions.description: Demonstrates how to delete pages from a PDF while logging the count of pages removed for each delete operation.

resize-and-booklet.title: Resize PDFs to 1024x768 and create a booklet
resize-and-booklet.description: Resizes a list of PDF files to 1024x768, concatenates them, and generates a booklet PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pages-multiple-pdfs.title: Delete Specific Pages from Multiple PDFs
delete-pages-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to delete given pages from each PDF file using PdfFileEditor and return the paths of the cleaned PDFs.

concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-separator.title: Concatenate PDFs with Blank Separator Page
concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-separator.description: Demonstrates how to insert a blank page between PDFs during concatenation using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-and-concatenate-pdfs.title: Resize PDFs to 1024x768 and Concatenate
resize-and-concatenate-pdfs.description: Resizes each page of multiple PDF files to 1024x768 and merges them into a single PDF document.

delete-pages-resize-stream.title: Delete Pages and Resize PDF Content, Return as Stream
delete-pages-resize-stream.description: Demonstrates how to delete selected pages from a PDF, resize the remaining page contents, and return the resulting document as a MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

concatenate-pdfs-add-page-numbers.title: Concatenate PDFs and Add Page Numbers
concatenate-pdfs-add-page-numbers.description: Combines multiple PDF files into a single document and inserts sequential page numbers on each page of the merged PDF.

create-booklet-left-pages.title: Create Booklet Using Custom Left Pages
create-booklet-left-pages.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF by selecting left pages from the first half of a source document using PdfFileEditor.

create-booklet-right-pages-second-half.title: Create Booklet Using Right Pages from Second Half of PDF
create-booklet-right-pages-second-half.description: Generates a booklet PDF that includes only the right‑hand pages from the second half of the source document.

validate-delete-page-count.title: Validate Delete Operation Reduces Page Count
validate-delete-page-count.description: Loads a PDF, deletes a page, and verifies that the page count decreases accordingly.
